headline: Citizenship by operation of law denied to 9,400 applicants
context: The National Registration Department denied 9,400 citizenship applications under Article 15A of the Federal Constitution between 2020 and 2024.

cards.big: 9,400 citizenship applications rejected under Article 15A since 2020
cards.sub: Foundlings and stateless children among those denied Malaysian citizenship

cards.big: Article 15A grants federal government discretion to register minors as citizens
cards.sub: No statutory criteria published for approval or rejection decisions

cards.big: 2024 Federal Court ruled mothers can confer citizenship to overseas-born children
cards.sub: Landmark Suriani ruling expanded citizenship rights but government appealed

cards.big: Average wait time for Article 15A applications exceeds 5 years
cards.sub: Children grow up without identity documents, schooling, or healthcare access

cards.big: 9,400 denials without published criteria means citizenship is arbitrary favour
Constitutional amendment on maternal citizenship rights tabled in October 2024
